name: Loader.story
visual_summary: Loader is a reusable UI component that displays a visual representation of data being loaded or processed, typically when the application is waiting for a response from a server. It is commonly used in web applications for providing feedback to users and creating a better user experience. This component can be used in various situations such as when a long-running operation is in progress.
